description: A tall, rectangular dresser made of wood with a dark, weathered finish. It features eight drawers arranged in a 4x2 configuration, with simple, horizontal metal handles on each drawer. The wood grain is prominent, running vertically on the sides and horizontally on the drawer fronts, giving it a textured appearance. The dresser has a slightly elevated base with tapered feet. The top of the dresser has a subtle molding detail. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for bedroom storage.
